<!-- How do you envision this working? -->

## How Important Is This?

- [ ] Nice to have (like remembering monthly anniversaries)
- [ ] Important (like remembering THE anniversary)
- [ ] Critical (like remembering their birthday)

## Would You Use This?

- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] When I remember to

*Pro tip: Features that help avoid "you should already know" situations get priority.*
